lemmas.primary_translation: double / alternate role / schedule extra service / fire both barrels / overlay metal / make a double / billiards shot

definitions.translation: the act of doubling, to double
examples: departementet er innstilt på å dublere et visst antall fengselsplasser

definitions.text: la to skuespillere skifte på samme rolle
definitions.translation: to have two actors alternate in the same role

definitions.text: sette opp to samtidige avganger for et rutegående transportmiddel
definitions.translation: to schedule two simultaneous departures for a scheduled transport

definitions.text: fyre av begge geværløpene raskt etter hverandre uten å forandre anlegg
definitions.translation: to fire both barrels of a gun rapidly one after another without changing position

definitions.text: overtrekke et metall med et lag finere metall
definitions.translation: to overlay a metal with a layer of finer metal

definitions.text: i biljard: støte motstanderens kule mot vantet slik at den kommer tilbake i motsatt retning
definitions.translation: in billiards: to strike the opponent's ball against the cushion so that it returns in the opposite direction
